case_title: YOUNGER RICHARD VS EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICE OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY YOUNGER RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICE OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
